bullets.text: Full-year 2014 combined ratio was 92.3, producing pretax underwriting income of $1.4 billion; ROE was ~20% on comprehensive income basis, approximately 1 point better than 2013 and well above the 96 target.

Written premiums reached $18.7 billion in 2014, up from $17 billion in 2013; the $20 billion milestone was described as clearly visible ahead, with Direct channel selling over 2 million policies for the first time.

Agency channel ended the year with a 2% reduction in auto policyholders; Direct channel achieved strong growth with new policies and improved policy life expectancy, while total auto added customers in a challenging year.

The letter formally introduced the 'Destination Era' as Progressive's third strategic era, targeting 'Robinson' customers (bundled multi-product households) who represent 40%+ of U.S. auto premium but less than 1% of Progressive's share.

Share repurchases totaled $271 million (11.1 million shares); ARX acquisition announced at ~$875 million; variable dividend of ~$0.69/share ($404 million) declared; $400 million 30-year bond issued at 3.70% in January 2015.

Snapshot had 12+ billion recorded miles and 2.5 million participants; renters insurance was introduced; Massachusetts Agency entry completed; expense ratio reached 20% and LAE ~10%, both described as hard-won landmarks.

Expense ratio of 20% and LAE of ~10% both reached milestone levels, described as having been envisioned 20+ years earlier; management saw further improvement potential through longer customer retention.
Agency Channel product design was modified to advance estimated Snapshot discount to point of sale, showing promising early results in Massachusetts; further state rollouts planned throughout 2015.
Investment portfolio delivered 4.5% total return on a $19 billion portfolio; $408 million interest/dividend income and $224 million realized gains; short-duration fixed-income strategy maintained.

Flo's Superstore campaign debuted its 100th commercial; LeBron James 'switched' with Flo for a Halloween promotion generating over 300 million social media views, amplifying brand reach significantly.
